Off Calendar Mar-10-2025 Off Calendar

Petition For: 1. Order Compelling Trustee To Perform Duties Pursuant To Trust; 2. Breach Of Fiduciary Duties By Initial Successor Trustee; 3. Suspension Of Initial Successor Trustee Pending Removal; 4. Removal Of Initial Successor Trustee; 5. Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Continued To Apr-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Vincent Yu, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Michelle Lazard, Petitioner.

Alina Laguna, Esq., personal appearance, for and with Leslie Sheppard, Respondent.

Roger Doughty, personal appearance, in propria persona, for Horizons Foundation, Beneficiary.

At the court's query, counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the instant petition. There is discussion regarding a roadmap to resolve this matter via ADR with counsel offering their views on the subject. The court advises that it intends to issue a Breslin order. The court instructs counsel to meet and confer and agree to a specific Mediator and mediation date. A Status hearing on the preceding shall be set for Mar-10-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The status hearing shall be taken off calendar if notice of an agreement to a Mediator and mediation date is provided to the assigned Examiner via email on or before Mar-07-2025.

The Petition For Order Compelling Trustee; Breach Of Fiduciary Duties; Suspension Of Initial Successor Trustee; Removal; Attorney's Fees And Costs is continued to Apr-21-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. A Status of Mediation shall be set for the same date and time.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Loke. Not Reported.
